- 🔍 rpc **safeoutputs**→`tools/call` `{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage\n\n**Summary:** In a Blazor Server project on .NET 10, `TaskCanceledException` thrown by `HttpClient` (when a request is explicitly cancelled) is being reported as an exception in Azure Application Insights via `Azure.Monitor.OpenTelemetry.AspNetCore 1.4.0`, whereas in .NET 8 the same scenario does not produce a reported exception.\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e📋 Issue Details\u003c/summary\u00...`
